name: Ludo Classic
author: LAN Arcade
description: The classic board game of strategy and luck for 2 to 4 players.

tokensPerPlayer.label: Tokens per Player
tokensPerPlayer.description: Number of tokens each player must race (1-4)

sixRollsAgain.label: Rolling 6 Rolls Again
sixRollsAgain.description: Rolling a six awards another turn

threeSixesSkip.label: Three Sixes Skip Turn
threeSixesSkip.description: Rolling three consecutive sixes skips your turn

safeZonesProtected.label: Safe Zones Protected
safeZonesProtected.description: Tokens cannot be captured when resting on safe star cells
